meta.title: How it works — inventory your assets in 3 steps
meta.description: Add what you own, let Vaulto organise it, and see your whole picture in three simple steps. AI-assisted capture does the data entry for you.

hero.heading: From scattered to organised, in three steps.
hero.intro: You don't have to type everything by hand. Vaulto reads your photos and documents and does the heavy lifting — so getting started takes minutes, not weekends.

steps.title: Add what you own.
steps.body: Snap a photo or upload a document and Vaulto reads it for you — drafting the details so you're not typing everything by hand. Add a room, a receipt, or a folder of paperwork in one go.
steps.detail: AI-assisted capture turns an overwhelming job into a few short sessions.

steps.title: Let Vaulto organise it.
steps.body: Group assets into collections, add the key facts that matter, and keep the documents that prove them attached right where they belong.
steps.detail: Property, accounts, investments, valuables, pensions — all in one structure.

steps.title: See the whole picture.
steps.body: Your family's assets and documents in one clear view — ready to share with the people who matter, and to plan ahead with a free overview when you're ready.
steps.detail: A clean snapshot you can hand to a solicitor or advisor.

finalCta.title: Start your vault — free
finalCta.body: Add your first few things in minutes. No spreadsheets required.
